description_long: This is a large, structured handbag with a deep brown exterior and a trapezoidal silhouette, featuring wide, angular sides that taper toward the base. The bag is equipped with two sturdy, rounded handles attached by gold-tone hardware, and a prominent gold zipper closure runs along the top. The front side displays a triangular metallic brand logo plate, adding a touch of luxury and distinction. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with minimal visible seams and no external pockets or embellishments apart from the hardware. The overall design is elegant and modern, suitable for both professional and casual urban settings. The interior is likely spacious, designed to accommodate personal items and daily essentials.
description: A large, structured brown handbag with gold hardware, dual rounded handles, and a prominent triangular brand logo on the front. The bag features a smooth, slightly glossy finish and a wide, angular silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the triangular brand logo, gold zipper, and dual handles with gold hardware.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's wide, angular profile and the thickness of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brown surface, gold zipper, and handle attachments without a logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the angular profile and handle structure seen in view 1.
attribute_brand_logo: Triangular metallic logo plate on the front, centered below the zipper, with engraved text and a raised border.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, rounded handles attached with gold hardware; not adjustable; designed for hand or forearm carry.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Gold zipper closure running along the top of the bag, with dual zipper pulls.
attribute_decorative_elements: Gold-tone hardware and a metallic brand logo plate; no other visible decorative elements.
